stages.concept:
# Unit 140: 분사의 역할 (명사 수식, 보어) - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **분사의 역할**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 분사는 **명사를 수식**하거나 **보어**로 쓰여요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **명사 앞에서 수식** (한 단어):

> A **sleeping** baby is cute. (자고 있는 아기)
> I ate **fried** chicken. (튀긴 치킨)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **명사 뒤에서 수식** (분사구 — 수식어가 길 때):

> The girl **sitting on the bench** is my friend.
> 벤치에 앉아 있는 소녀는 내 친구이다.

> The letter **written in English** is from Tom.
> 영어로 쓰인 편지는 Tom에게서 온 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **주격 보어** (2형식):

> She remained **standing**.
> 그녀는 서 있는 채로 남았다.

> The door was left **unlocked**.
> 문이 잠기지 않은 채 놔졌다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **목적격 보어** (5형식):

> I heard him **singing**.
> 나는 그가 노래하는 것을 들었다.

> I had my hair **cut**.
> 나는 머리를 잘랐다. (잘리게 했다)

**Q. 다음 문장의 밑줄 친 분사가 하는 역할로 알맞은 것을 고르세요.**
"The boy <u>reading</u> a book is my brother."
1. 주격 보어 역할
2. 명사 수식 역할 ✅
3. 목적격 보어 역할

👩‍🏫 선생님: 정답! 'reading a book'이라는 분사구가 앞의 명사 'The boy'를 꾸며주어 '책을 읽고 있는 소년'이라는 뜻이 되므로 명사 수식 역할을 하고 있어요.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 분사는 명사 앞/뒤에서 수식하거나 보어(주격/목적격)로 쓰이는 거군요!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 140: 분사의 역할 명사 수식, 보어 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I saw a few (     ) stars in the night sky.
> **정답** shining

---

**02.** The ? window was replaced.
> **정답** broken

---

**03.** She saw a ? boy in the park.
> **정답** crying

---

**04.** I found my ? phone.
> **정답** lost

---

**05.** The ? girl is my sister.
> **정답** smiling

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The breaking window needs to be fixed.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** breaking → broken

---

**07.** I found a losing wallet.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** losing → lost

---

**08.** She heard a cried baby.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** cried → crying

---

**09.** The cooking food smells good.
(요리된)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** cooking → cooked

---

**10.** He saw a fallen leaf.
(떨어지고 있는)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** fallen → falling

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
뛰고 있는 소년은 내 동생이다.
The boy is my brother.
> **정답** running

---

**12.** 깨진 컵을 치워라.
Clean up the cup.
> **정답** broken

---

**13.** 웃고 있는 소녀는 내 친구이다.
The girl is my friend.
> **정답** smiling

---

**14.** 요리된 음식은 맛있었다.
The food was delicious.
> **정답** cooked

---

**15.** 잠자고 있는 고양이를 봐.
Look at the cat.
> **정답** sleeping

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
뛰고 있는 소년은 내 형이다.
The running boy my is brother
> **정답** The / running / boy / is / my / brother

---

**17.** 깨진 유리를 치워라.
Clean the up broken glass
> **정답** Clean / up / the / broken / glass

---

**18.** 울고 있는 아기를 안아 줘.
Hold the baby crying
> **정답** Hold / the / crying / baby

---

**19.** 삶은 달걀을 먹어라.
Eat the boiled egg
> **정답** Eat / the / boiled / egg

---

**20.** 떨어지는 나뭇잎이 예쁘다.
The falling pretty leaves are
> **정답** The / falling / leaves / are / pretty
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 140: 분사의 역할 명사 수식, 보어 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The man __________ a lot of bags took a taxi.
is carrying
carrying
carried
carries
> **정답** carrying

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
The bird __________ on the tree is cute.
I saw the bird ___________ on the tree.
sung - sung
singing - sung
singing - singing
sing - sing
> **정답** singing - singing

---

**03.** 다음 중 문장에서 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 하나를
고르시오.
I saw her playing the piano.
I like the house painted red.
I noticed the water boiling.
I found my clothes torn.
> **정답** I like the house painted red.

---

**04.** 다음 중 문장에서 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 하나를
고르시오.
They heard shocking news from us.
I ate fried potatoes with Coke.
She wants to have a house made of wood.
She saw the cat stealing fish.
> **정답** She saw the cat stealing fish.

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She wants to buy a used car.
She wore clothes made by her mother.
Poems written by children are innocent.
Look at the slept puppy.
> **정답** Look at the slept puppy.

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I read a letter writing by her.
Look at the growing trees in the garden.
The girl playing in the room is my sister.
I watched a terrifying movie yesterday.
> **정답** I read a letter writing by her.

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She found the dog lying down.
He saw the fence painting green.
I heard someone shouting.
I saw her speaking on the stage.
> **정답** He saw the fence painting green.

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I should read the book __________ in English.
is writing
wrote
written
writing
> **정답** written

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 누군가 나를 밀치는 것을 느꼈다.
I felt someone pushing me.
I felt someone pushed me.
I felt pushing someone me.
I felt someone to push me.
> **정답** I felt someone pushing me.

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 축구 경기에서 다리가 부러졌다.
He got his leg broke in the soccer game.
He got his leg break in the soccer game.
He got his leg breaking in the soccer game.
He got his leg broken in the soccer game.
> **정답** He got his leg broken in the soccer game.

---

**11.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 건너편에 서 있는 남자를 안다.
I know a man stood across the street.
I know a man standing across the street.
I know a man stand across the street.
I know a standing man across the street.
> **정답** I know a man standing across the street.

---

**12.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
The child __________ in bed suddenly woke up and
was __________ to hear the loud noise.
sleeping - surprised
slept - surprising
slept - surprised
sleeping - surprising
> **정답** sleeping - surprised

---

**13.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He is picking up trash throwing
away on the road.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** throwing → thrown

---

**14.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Amy is changed the battery
in a stopped watch.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** changed → changing

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I gave her a boiling egg.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** boiling → boiled

---

**16.** 다음 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태가 알맞은 것끼리
짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She was (carry) away by a rescue team.
The building was (destroy) by tornadoes.
carrying - destroying
carried - destroyed
carried - destroying
carry - destroyed
> **정답** carried - destroyed

---

**17.** 다음 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태가 알맞은 것끼리
짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She saw the sun (rise).
I felt a bad smell (come) from the room.
risen - coming
risen - come
rising - coming
rising - come
> **정답** rising - coming

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He caught a grasshopper run
in the field.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** run → running

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The general won the war
returned home.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** won → winning

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
He saw many animals suffered in the forest. He
rescued and protected the animals. The animals
taking care of by him
recovered their health. He was pleased to
see it.
> **정답** suffering, taken care of, recovered, pleased
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 140 분사의 역할 명사 수식, 보어중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그는 마당에 숨겨진 보물을 발견했다.
힌트 (     ) find, a, treasure, hide
He  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  in the garden.
정답 found, a, treasure (hidden), hidden (treasure)

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
수업에 집중하고 있는 학생들이 선생님을 보고 있다.
힌트 (     ) concentrate on, the class
The students  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  are
looking at the teacher.
정답 concentrating, on, the, class

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그녀는 마당에 있는 큰 나무가 잘리는 것을 보았다.
힌트 (     ) a big tree, cut down
She saw  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  in the
yard.
정답 a, big, tree, cut, down

---

**04.** 주어진 말을 알맞은 형태로 바꾸어 문장을 완성하시오.
We were [surprise]  to see the magic show.
정답 surprised

---

**05.** 주어진 말을 알맞은 형태로 바꾸어 문장을 완성하시오.
He bought a [use]  car yesterday.
정답 used

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 알맞은 형태로 바꾸어 문장을 완성하시오.
They were very [impress]  with the paintings
[paint]  by him.
정답 impressed, painted

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
the building, shake
A: I felt something strange. What happens here?
B: I felt  (     )   (     )   (     ) . Let's hurry out.
정답 the, building, shaking

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
the girl, name
  (     )   (     )  Su-jin is my best friend.
정답 The, girl, named

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은
말을 쓰시오.
ring
A: Wake up. The alarm is  (     ) .
B: I also heard the alarm  (     ) . But I want to sleep
more.
정답 ringing, ringing

---

**10.** 다음 글을 읽고 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오. (분사형으로 쓸 것)
He heard someone [sing]  near the house. When
he left the house, he saw a girl [sit]  under a tree.
She was [play]  with her dog. She looked
[please] .
정답 singing, sitting, playing, pleased

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 140: 분사의 역할 명사 수식, 보어 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The girl __________ a heavy backpack took the bus. is carrying carrying carried carries
> 정답: carrying

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The cat __________ on the sofa is cute.
I saw the cat ___________ on the sofa. sat - sat sleeping - slept sleeping - sleeping sleep - sleep
> 정답: sleeping - sleeping

---

**03.** 다음 중 문장에서 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 하나를 고르시오.
I saw her drawing a picture.
I like the wall painted blue.
I noticed the water freezing.
I found my bag torn.
> 정답: I like the wall painted blue.

---

**04.** 다음 중 문장에서 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 하나를 고르시오.
They heard surprising news from us.
I ate baked potatoes with salad.
She wants to have a dress made of silk.
She saw the dog chasing a squirrel.
> 정답: She saw the dog chasing a squirrel.

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She wants to buy a used textbook.
He wore clothes made by his grandmother.
Stories written by students are creative.
Look at the slept cat.
> 정답: Look at the slept cat.

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I read a note writing by him.
Look at the growing flowers in the garden.
The boy playing in the yard is my cousin.
I watched a fascinating documentary yesterday.
> 정답: I read a note writing by him.

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She found the cat lying on the mat.
He saw the door painting white.
I heard someone singing.
I saw him running on the track.
> 정답: He saw the door painting white.

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I should read the article __________ in Korean. is writing wrote written writing
> 정답: written

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 누군가 나를 당기는 것을 느꼈다.
I felt someone pulling me.
I felt someone pulled me.
I felt pulling someone me.
I felt someone to pull me.
> 정답: I felt someone pulling me.

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 농구 경기에서 팔이 부러졌다.
She got her arm broke in the basketball game.
She got her arm break in the basketball game.
She got her arm breaking in the basketball game.
She got her arm broken in the basketball game.
> 정답: She got her arm broken in the basketball game.

---

**11.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 건너편에 앉아 있는 여자를 안다.
I know a woman sat across the street.
I know a woman sitting across the street.
I know a woman sit across the street.
I know a sitting woman across the street.
> 정답: I know a woman sitting across the street.

---

**12.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The baby __________ in a crib suddenly woke up and was __________ to hear the thunder.
sleeping - surprised slept - surprising slept - surprised sleeping - surprising
> 정답: sleeping - surprised

---

**13.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. She  is  picking  up  leaves  throwing  away  on  the  ground. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: throwing → thrown

---

**14.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Tom  is  changed  the  tire  on  a stopped  car. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: changed → changing

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. I  gave  him  a  boiling  potato. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: boiling → boiled

---

**16.** 다음 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태가 알맞은 것끼리 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
He was (carry) away by an ambulance.
The fence was (destroy) by the storm.
carrying - destroying carried - destroyed carried - destroying carry - destroyed
> 정답: carried - destroyed

---

**17.** 다음 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태가 알맞은 것끼리 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She saw the moon (rise).
I felt a cold breeze (come) from the window.
risen - coming risen - come rising - coming rising - come
> 정답: rising - coming

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. She  caught  a  butterfly  fly  in  the  garden. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: fly → flying

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  athlete  won  the  race  returned  home. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: won → winning

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
She saw many plants suffered in the drought.
She rescued and watered the plants.
The plants taking care of by her recovered their health.
She was pleased to see it.
> 정답: suffering, taken care of, recovered, pleased
